chapter_title: Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
text:
A bank or trust company in this state may:

(1) act as depository of bond proceeds or revenues derived from the operation of the project; and

(2) provide indemnity bonds or pledge securities the county requires.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 284. Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
##### § 284.044 — Depository

A bank or trust company in this state may:

    (1) act as depository of bond proceeds or revenues derived from the operation of the project; and

    (2) provide indemnity bonds or pledge securities the county requires.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A bank or trust company in this state may:
act as depository of bond proceeds or revenues derived from the operation of the project; and
provide indemnity bonds or pledge securities the county requires.
